heading: Sunday Night
text: Becoming mostly clear and calm. A chance of valley fog. Lows in the mid 50s to low 60s in the broad valleys.

heading: Monday
text: Any early fog giving way to mostly sunny skies, clouds building north and west in the afternoon. Rising chance for scattered showers in the early evening northeast of I-89. Highs in the 80s, nearing 90 in the warmer valleys. Wind turning southwest near 10 mph, light north.

heading: Monday Night
text: Spotty shower north, diminishing before midnight. Clouds lingering north, partly clear otherwise. Lows in the 60s.
